sections.paragraph:
- Original: βλασφημέω

- Transliteration: Blasphemeo

- Phonetic: blas-fay-meh'-o

- Definition:

1. to speak reproachfully, rail at, revile, calumniate, blaspheme

2. to be evil spoken of, reviled, railed at

- Origin: from G989

- TDNT entry: 11:21,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G989; to vilify; specifically to speak impiously: - (speak) blaspheme (-er -mously -my) defame rail on revile speak evil.
